customer_message: Zamówiłem jedzenie ale nie dotarło. Chcę zwrotu. Kuryr mówił że dostarczył ale nie ma żadnego jedzenia.
alfred_response: I understand you're requesting a refund for an undelivered order. Based on our standard refund policy, orders marked as delivered are not eligible for automatic refunds without photo evidence.
failure_detail: Refund eligibility logic did not account for Polish market rule allowing automatic refund on non-delivery claims within 30 minutes
recommended_fix: Update refund decision tree with Polish market exception for non-delivery claims < 30 min

customer_message: You guys charged me twice for the same trip! I can see two identical charges of ₹284 in my payment history.
alfred_response: I see you're having trouble with a promo code. Let me help you check your available promotions and apply any eligible discounts to your account.
failure_detail: Misclassified duplicate charge complaint as promo code issue. Both involve payment amounts which triggered wrong intent.
recommended_fix: Add disambiguation step for payment amount mentions; improve intent examples for duplicate_charge

customer_message: My weekly payout hasn't arrived. It's been 5 days now. I have bills to pay. This happens every month with Bolt Nigeria.
alfred_response: Payouts are processed every Monday and typically arrive within 1-3 business days. Please allow additional time for bank processing.
failure_detail: Alfred applied global payout timeline. Nigerian bank processing adds 2-4 additional business days not reflected in Alfred's knowledge.
recommended_fix: Create Nigeria-specific payout delay knowledge article with accurate timelines and escalation path

customer_message: Der Roller lässt sich nicht entsperren. Ich stehe hier seit 10 Minuten und die App zeigt nur Fehler.
alfred_response: I'm looking up your vehicle status now... [System timeout] I'm unable to retrieve vehicle data at this time. Please try again in a few minutes.
failure_detail: Vehicle telemetry API timeout after 15s. No fallback response triggered. Customer left without resolution.
recommended_fix: Add 8s timeout + fallback response; alert platform team for DE vehicle API instability

customer_message: El conductor me asustó mucho durante el viaje. Tomó rutas extrañas y se comportó de manera amenazante. Me sentí en peligro.
alfred_response: Thank you for your feedback. We take safety seriously. Your report has been logged. A standard investigation will be initiated within 5-7 business days.
failure_detail: Response was cold and bureaucratic for a customer describing active fear and threat. No empathy, no immediate safety acknowledgment, no crisis pathway.
recommended_fix: Add safety severity classifier; route P0 safety incidents to empathy-first template with immediate human handoff SLA

customer_message: My food is 45 minutes late. The restaurant says they gave it to the courier an hour ago. I want a refund.
alfred_response: I can see your order is currently in transit. Food delivery delays can happen due to traffic. Your order should arrive soon. If it doesn't arrive in 20 more minutes, contact us again.
failure_detail: Alfred classified as status inquiry but customer clearly asked for refund. Deflection to 'wait more' created false resolution. Case reopened 30 min later.
recommended_fix: Add refund trigger when delay >40min detected in customer message; don't deflect explicit refund requests

customer_message: Driver cancelled 3 times tonight. I'm late for work. Why does this keep happening?
alfred_response: I'm sorry about the repeated cancellations. I can see you had 3 cancellation events. To help prevent this, try booking during off-peak hours. You haven't been charged for cancelled trips.

customer_message: I was charged R180 for a trip but the app showed R95 when I booked. Why is there such a big difference?
alfred_response: Price differences can occur due to surge pricing during peak hours. Your trip may have been completed during a high-demand period when rates are automatically adjusted.
failure_detail: Alfred explained surge pricing but didn't verify whether surge was actually active during the trip. Customer reopened seeking actual refund.
recommended_fix: Query billing API to verify surge flag before giving surge explanation; offer refund if surge not applied

customer_message: Mera account verify nahi ho raha hai. Documents upload kiye 2 hafte pehle. Koi response nahi aaya.
alfred_response: I'm unable to retrieve your verification status at this time. Our systems are experiencing a temporary delay. Please try again later.
failure_detail: KYC verification API timed out. Alfred gave generic error with no fallback or escalation path. Driver onboarding blocked for 14 days.
recommended_fix: Add fallback to human queue for verification API failures; create SLA monitoring for KYC pipeline

customer_message: Dostałem złe jedzenie. Zamiast pizzy przyszły nuggetsy. To trzecia zła dostawa w tym miesiącu od Bolt Food.
alfred_response: I understand you received the wrong items. Our refund policy for incorrect orders covers 100% of the order value. Please provide a photo of the incorrect items within 24 hours.

customer_message: I want to dispute this charge. My card was debited but the driver never showed up.
alfred_response: Based on our records, your trip was completed at 14:32. Refunds cannot be processed for completed trips. Please rate your driver to help improve our service.
failure_detail: Alfred treated trip as completed based on driver GPS log. Did not detect ghost trip pattern (driver marked arrival without picking up customer).
recommended_fix: Cross-check GPS proximity between rider and driver at pickup; flag ghost trip pattern for review

customer_message: Scooter öffnet sich nicht. Habe 5 Euro bezahlt aber konnte nicht fahren. Bitte Rückerstattung.
alfred_response: I was unable to verify the vehicle status. [Error: Vehicle telemetry service unavailable]. Transferring to human support.
failure_detail: Germany vehicle telemetry API showing 14.2% error rate this week. Scooter unlock failures routed to Alfred with no fallback resolution path.
recommended_fix: Investigate DE telemetry API instability; add automatic refund for confirmed failed unlock attempts

customer_message: Quiero reportar que el conductor estaba hablando por teléfono todo el viaje. Eso es muy peligroso.
alfred_response: Your safety report has been received and logged. ID: RPT-29841. Our safety team will review within 5-7 business days. Thank you for helping make Bolt safer.
failure_detail: Classification and resolution technically correct. But CSAT=2 because response felt bureaucratic. Customer wanted acknowledgment, not just a reference number.
recommended_fix: Add empathy-first opening for all safety reports; confirm customer is safe; offer immediate compensation for poor experience

customer_message: I was charged for a trip I cancelled within 2 minutes. Your policy says cancellation is free within 3 minutes.
alfred_response: I've reviewed your trip details. The cancellation fee of KSh 50 was applied because our records show the driver had already accepted and was en route. Cancellation fees apply when a driver is dispatched.

customer_message: The driver took a completely different route and my fare was 3x the estimate. This is cheating.
alfred_response: Fare differences from the estimate may occur due to actual route taken, traffic, or tolls. The fare you were charged reflects the actual trip distance. Estimates are not guaranteed.
failure_detail: Alfred dismissed route fraud signal. 3x fare deviation with route deviation report should trigger fraud review, not policy explanation.
recommended_fix: Add fraud detection trigger for >2x fare deviation with route deviation complaint; auto-refund and flag driver

customer_message: I left my phone in the delivery bag. The courier is not answering my calls. Please help me get it back.
alfred_response: For lost items, please use the Lost Items feature in the app under Trip History. You can contact the courier directly through the app for 24 hours after delivery.
failure_detail: Alfred gave generic lost item guidance. Customer specifically said courier isn't answering. Missing escalation path when self-service fails.
recommended_fix: Add check: if courier contact fails, escalate to support with courier contact attempt record

customer_message: Proszę o zwrot za zamówienie z wczoraj. Jedzenie było zimne i niezdatne do jedzenia.
alfred_response: I've processed your refund request for order #PL-44821. Cold food qualifies for a partial refund of 50% per our quality policy. You should see the credit within 3-5 business days.

customer_message: 3 days late on my payout. I've been driving 12 hours a day this week. I need this money for fuel.
alfred_response: Payouts are processed every Monday and should arrive within 2 business days. There may be a delay due to bank processing. Please wait until end of week.
failure_detail: Nigerian payout timelines differ from global. Response did not reflect Nigerian partner bank processing delays. Agent override issued emergency payout.
recommended_fix: Update NG payout knowledge with actual timelines; create emergency payout escalation path for drivers

customer_message: My promo code SPRING20 isn't working. I've used it before and it always worked.
alfred_response: I've checked your account and the promo code SPRING20 expired on April 21st. You can find active promotions in the Promotions section of your app. I'm applying our new SPRING25 offer to your next order as a goodwill gesture.
